description: TCEL Tenant-9 T9-029-Document-Evidence package, generated from the spec folder as ECARMF knowledge-package metadata (structure faithful; universal AI-boundary/cross-tenant controls enforced, full control catalog carried as a knowledge asset for traceability). Depends on Foundation; does NOT re-declare RecordReceived; cross-package name collisions auto-omitted by the generator's claimed-names ledger.
name: TCEL T9-029-Document-Evidence

rules.name: Cross-tenant denial
rules.reasonTemplate: DM-016: access denied - cross-tenant access is prohibited (Security).

capabilities.name: TCEL T9-029-Document-Evidence

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-029-Document-Evidence Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: DM-016 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: DM-001 Document registration | Governance | Require documented compliance: Document registration | Critical | Data Governance. DM-002 Version control | Governance | Require documented compliance: Version control | Critical | Data Governance. DM-003 Immutable evidence | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Immutable evidence | Critical | Data Governance. DM-004 Hash verification | Governance | Require documented compliance: Hash verification | Critical | Data Governance. DM-005 Chain of custody | Governance | Require documented compliance: Chain of custody | Critical | Data Governance. DM-006 Metadata completeness | Governance | Require documented compliance: Metadata completeness | Critical | Data Governance. DM-007 Retention policy | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Retention policy | Critical | Data Governance. DM-008 Legal hold | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Legal hold | Critical | Data Governance. DM-009 Access control | Governance | Require documented compliance: Access control | Critical | Data Governance. DM-010 Export control | Governance | Require documented compliance: Export control | Critical | Data Governance. DM-011 Signature validation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Signature validation | Critical | Data Governance. DM-012 Approval state | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Approval state | Critical | Data Governance. DM-013 Supersession | Governance | Require documented compliance: Supersession | Critical | Data Governance. DM-014 Classification | Governance | Require documented compliance: Classification | Critical | Data Governance. DM-015 Encryption | Governance | Require documented compliance: Encryption | Critical | Data Governance. DM-016 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | High | Security. DM-017 Privileged document handling | Governance | Require documented compliance: Privileged document handling | High | Data Governance. DM-018 Deletion approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Deletion approval | High | Data Governance. DM-019 Restore testing | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Data Governance. DM-020 Document lineage | Governance | Require documented compliance: Document lineage | High | Data Governance. DM-021 AI mutation prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: AI mutation prohibition | High | AI Governance. DM-022 Evidence link integrity | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Evidence link integrity | High | Data Governance. DM-023 Duplicate prevention | Governance | Require documented compliance: Duplicate prevention | High | Data Governance. DM-024 Audit trail | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Audit trail | High | Data Governance. DM-025 Disaster recovery | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Data Governance.
